came right back: I’d give him something to pep

pg410-p2-s1:
So I immediately started taking and shooting pep
pills.
pg410-p2-s2:
Eventually, I was taking forty-five milligrams of
the long-acting Benzedrine and forty-five of the shortacting
just to get out of bed in the morning.
pg410-p2-s3:
I took
more through the day to increase the high, and more
to maintain it; when I overshot the mark, I’d take
tranquilizers to level off.
pg410-p2-s4:
The pep pills affected my
hearing at times: I couldn’t listen fast enough to hear
what I was saying.
pg410-p2-s5:
I’d think, I wonder why I’m saying
that again—I’ve already said it three times.
pg410-p2-s6:
Still, I
couldn’t turn my mouth off.
pg410-p2:
So I immediately started taking and shooting pep
pills. Eventually, I was taking forty-five milligrams of
the long-acting Benzedrine and forty-five of the shortacting
just to get out of bed in the morning. I took
more through the day to increase the high, and more
to maintain it; when I overshot the mark, I’d take
tranquilizers to level off. The pep pills affected my
hearing at times: I couldn’t listen fast enough to hear
what I was saying. I’d think, I wonder why I’m saying
that again—I’ve already said it three times. Still, I
couldn’t turn my mouth off.
pg410-p3-s1:
For the leveling-off process, I just loved intravenous
Demerol, but I found it hard to practice good medicine
while shooting morphine.
pg410-p3-s2:
Following an injection, I
would have to keep one hand busy scratching my constantly
itching nose and would also have sudden uncontrollable
urges to vomit.
pg410-p3-s3:
I never got much effect
out of codeine and Percodan and the tranquilizers.
pg410-p3-s4: However, for a period of time I was injecting Pentothal intravenously to put myself to sleep.
pg410-p3-s5:
That’s the
stuff used when the oral surgeon puts the needle in
your vein and says, “Count to ten,” and before you get
to two, you’re asleep.
pg410-p3-s6:
Instant blackout was what it was,
and it seemed delightful.
pg410-p3-s7:
I didn’t feel I could lie in
bed and squirt the stuff in my veins while my kids and
wife stood around watching me, so I kept the drug in
my bag and the bag in the car and the car in the
garage.
pg410-p3-s8: Luckily, the garage was attached to the house.
pg410-p3-s9:
In the garage I would put the needle in my vein and
then try to figure out exactly how much medication to
inject to overcome the pep pills while adding to the
pg410-p3:
For the leveling-off process, I just loved intravenous
Demerol, but I found it hard to practice good medicine
while shooting morphine. Following an injection, I
would have to keep one hand busy scratching my constantly
itching nose and would also have sudden uncontrollable
urges to vomit. I never got much effect
out of codeine and Percodan and the tranquilizers. However, for a period of time I was injecting Pentothal intravenously to put myself to sleep. That’s the
stuff used when the oral surgeon puts the needle in
your vein and says, “Count to ten,” and before you get
to two, you’re asleep. Instant blackout was what it was,
and it seemed delightful. I didn’t feel I could lie in
bed and squirt the stuff in my veins while my kids and
wife stood around watching me, so I kept the drug in
my bag and the bag in the car and the car in the
garage. Luckily, the garage was attached to the house. In the garage I would put the needle in my vein and
then try to figure out exactly how much medication to
inject to overcome the pep pills while adding to the
